CustomField.description: Maximum delay after period-end by which the credit note must be issued, as defined in the contract. Format: number followed by D (calendar days) or BD (business days), e.g. 30D or 10BD.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the number of days from the contract, followed by "D" for calendar days or "BD" for business days (e.g. 30D, 10BD).
CustomField.label: Credit Note Max Timing (in D+)
